title: Malformed LHS in NBA when it is a simple expression
body:
This comes from the same file as "#5846" but minimized

original error:
```
%Error: Internal Error: jtag_master.sv:97:13: /home/arch/repro/verilator/src/V3Delayed.cpp:351: Malformed LHS in NBA
   97 |       data_o[i-1] <= tdo;
      |             ^
                        tb_hello_world.sv:7:1: ... note: In file included from 'tb_hello_world.sv'
```

after minimization
```
%Error: Internal Error: jtag_master.sv:83:26: /home/arch/repro/verilator/src/V3Delayed.cpp:351: Malformed LHS in NBA
   83 |     @(posedge tck) data_o[$size(data_i)-1] <= tdo;
      |                          ^
                        dm_pkg.sv:430:1: ... note: In file included from 'dm_pkg.sv'
                        sv-bugpoint-minimized.sv:2:1: ... note: In file included from 'sv-bugpoint-minimized.sv'
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```


minimized test using sv-bugpoint:

```systemverilog
`line 1 "tb_hello_world.sv" 1
module tb_hello_world;
  jtag_master jtag();


  rvlab_tests uut (
    .jtag(jtag)
  );

`line 19 "tb_hello_world.sv" 0

  always begin

`line 23 "tb_hello_world.sv" 0

    uut.test_idcode();
  end

`line 29 "tb_hello_world.sv" 0
endmodule

`line 429 "dm_pkg.sv" 0
`line 1 "jtag_master.sv" 1



`line 4 "jtag_master.sv" 0
interface jtag_master;

`line 6 "jtag_master.sv" 0
  logic tck;
  logic tdo;

`line 82 "jtag_master.sv" 0
  task cycle_dr_32(output logic [31:0] data_o, input logic [31:0] data_i);
    @(posedge tck) data_o[$size(data_i)-1] <= tdo;
  endtask

`line 183 "jtag_master.sv" 0
endinterface

`line 185 "jtag_master.sv" 0
`line 1 "rvlab_tests.sv" 1



`line 4 "rvlab_tests.sv" 0
module rvlab_tests (
          jtag_master jtag
);



`line 11 "rvlab_tests.sv" 0



`line 14 "rvlab_tests.sv" 0
  task test_idcode();
    bit [31:0] idcode_read;
    jtag.cycle_dr_32(idcode_read, '0);

`line 28 "rvlab_tests.sv" 0
  endtask

`line 30 "rvlab_tests.sv" 0
endmodule
```

verilator version: b49351356e17abc392710d2a60cbff60d1dbad83
running on archlinux.
